architecture.summary: ATTEMPT learns an attention module that dynamically interpolates fixed source task soft prompts and a task-specific target prompt. During inference and training on a target task, the attention mechanism computes per-instance weights over source prompts and the target prompt; these weighted prompts are concatenated and prepended to the input tokens. Only the target prompt and attention weights are trainable; the base LM and source prompts remain frozen. Source prompts are pre-computed soft prompt vectors derived from large-scale source tasks.
trained_components: shared attention weights across multi-task training

biblio.title: ATTEMPT: Parameter-Efficient Multi-task Tuning via Attentional Mixtures of Soft Prompts

claims.statement: ATTEMPT updates 2,300 times fewer parameters than full fine-tuning

baseline.name: prompt tuning; full fine-tuning; parameter-efficient methods with 10x more parameters

claims.statement: ATTEMPT significantly outperforms prompt tuning and outperforms or matches fully fine-tuned or other parameter-efficient tuning approaches that use 10 times more parameters
ATTEMPT overcomes instability of prompt tuning and achieves high task performance using learned knowledge from high-resource tasks
ATTEMPT outperforms previous work in few-shot learning settings
ATTEMPT is modular using pre-trained soft prompts, and can flexibly add or remove source prompts for effective knowledge transfer
